description: The StaticAudioClip component is what stores pre recorded audio data for components that play audio like AudioClipPlayer. This component is auto generated when a sound file is imported into the game as part of an audio clip object.

fields.URL: The audio clip data location to load.
fields.LoadMode: How and when to load the audio
fields.SampleRateMode: How to sample the audio's audio data.

methods.Normalize: Makes the volume during the audio clip consistent.
methods.AdjustVolume: Makes the volume louder or quieter.
methods.ExtractSides: Split the audio into two or more clips for different audio tracks.
methods.Denoise: Removes noise from the audio clip
methods.TrimSilence: removes the silence from the start and end of the audio clip
methods.TrimStartSilence: removes the silence from the start of the clip.
methods.TrimEndSilence: removes the silence from the end of the clip.
methods.TrimStart: cuts off audio data from the start of the audio clip.
methods.TrimEnd: cuts off audio data from the end of the audio clip.
methods.FadeIn: Makes the audio fade in over x seconds.
methods.FadeOut: Makes the audio fade out over x seconds.
methods.MakeFadeLoop: Makes the audio loopable, using a cross fade of x seconds.
methods.ConvertToWAV: converts the audio clip type to Windows audio vodec.
methods.ConvertToVorbis: converts the audio clip type to Vorbis.
methods.ConvertToFLAC: Converts the audio clip type to FLAC.
methods.ApplyZitaReverb: ZitaParameters]] to create a reverberation sound effect on this audio clip.
methods.MakeLoopable: Makes the audio loopable, using a cross fade of x seconds.
